name: Cranberry Sauce II
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a saucepan.
2. Bring to a boil over medium heat, stirring constantly.
3. Cook for about 8 minutes until the berries pop and the sauce thickens.
If you want it sweeter, try using apple juice instead of orange juice. Some people like adding chopped nuts (pecans preferred), with walnuts as a second choice. Experimenting with unsweetened coconut can also work, though others prefer not to use it.
Cranberry sauce can be enjoyed year-round. After the holidays, freeze extra bags for later use. They're great in bread and muffins too.
